goal: Unify Trash light, purple, and dark themes around the UploadDialog tech glass visual language.
assumptions: Trash keeps 10 desktop/tablet columns, 5 mobile columns, 82% thumbnail area, and one-line truncated filenames.
Restore, permanent delete, empty trash, back navigation, query invalidation, and confirmation behavior remain unchanged.
Theme switching remains CSS-variable driven through data-theme and theme classes.
risks: Overlay density could reduce mobile readability.
Light mode could become too dark if upload-tech language is copied too literally.
Purple mode could become too neon if cyan and magenta accents are too strong.
verification: Playwright screenshots for dark/light/purple desktop and mobile in docs/evidence/
